name: multi-take averaging UX

consensus_f1_ge_0.72.note: no 5-triplet user-recorded dataset available; mir public corpora do not include multi-take recordings of the same melody by the same user

discard_rationale: The strict 'consensus F1 >= 0.72 on 5 triplets' criterion requires 5 sets of 3 distinct user-recorded takes of the same melody (15 audio clips). No mir public corpus (Vocadito, MIR-1K, MTG-QBH, MAESTRO) has multi-take metadata, and synthesising 'three takes' from a single recording with random perturbations would not exercise the consensus logic realistically. Code path + UI are shipped; the F1 numbers are unsatisfiable without a user-supplied dataset.
